name: Gerry Goffin
abstract: Gerald Goffin (February 11, 1939 – June 19, 2014) was an American lyricist. Collaborating initially with his first wife, Carole King, he co-wrote many international pop hits of the early and mid-1960s, including the US No.

about_quotes.speaker: Anne Phillips
about_quotes.evidence: And then I found out about demos for songwriters, and it was a wonderful time. There were the older songwriters and there were the new kids coming in like Carole King and Gerry Goffin and Ellie Greenwich and Neil Sedaka, all those people.
about_quotes.doc_title: Anne Phillips interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, February 24, 2025
